agent.greeting.text:
Welcome. I'm your CEO Assistant — your first employee at your new company.

SIDJUA gives you a fully equipped, secure office building with backup, documentation, and communication infrastructure. But the company is yours. You hire your agents, train them, define workflows, and correct them when things go wrong.

But be aware — some doors are still missing. Some are there, but where are the keys? And some elevator shafts are open but empty. So please — tell us what's not working or missing so we can implement it. (But like always, enhancements or design changes may come with additional costs...)

You're standing on day one of your new company. I can help you set up everything: create agents, configure providers, define governance rules, and troubleshoot problems. I also keep track of your tasks, remind you of deadlines, and remember what we've worked on together.

Right now I'm running on a free model — great for getting started and basic tasks. For full assistant capabilities like better memory and smarter planning, you'll want a more capable model. I'll explain how to set that up when you're ready.

What would you like to do first?
agent.dienstschluss.title: Dienstschluss — Session Wrap-Up

error.OUTPUT-001.message: Task output must have content_text or content_binary

error.OUTPUT-003.suggestion: Re-fetch output — content may be corrupt

error.SUMMARY-003.message: Summary validation failed: exceeds max length
error.COMM-001.message: Semantic search unavailable — no embedder configured, using direct query fallback
error.COMM-001.suggestion: Configure an embedding provider for semantic search
error.SEC-010.suggestion: Skill paths must not contain '..' or escape the work directory
error.SEC-011.suggestion: Module IDs must be 2-64 chars, lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens, starting and ending with alphanumeric
error.SEC-012.suggestion: Remove newline or carriage-return characters from environment variable values
error.SEC-013.suggestion: Remove the disallowed capability from the module manifest
error.EMB-001.suggestion: Configure an embedding provider before running migration. See: sidjua config --help
error.EMB-002.message: Embedding provider returned a zero vector
error.EMB-002.suggestion: Check your API key and embedding provider configuration
error.EMB-003.suggestion: Ensure the embedding provider model matches the expected dimensions in config
error.IGW-001.message: Service not found in adapter registry
error.IGW-001.suggestion: Register the adapter or enable intelligent path
error.IGW-002.suggestion: Check the action name in the adapter definition
error.IGW-003.suggestion: Fix the adapter YAML — check required fields
error.IGW-004.suggestion: Provide agent_id, service, action, and request_id
error.IGW-005.suggestion: Check division web access policy or request approval
error.IGW-006.suggestion: Set the required secret via: sidjua secrets set <namespace> <key>
error.IGW-007.suggestion: Increase timeout_seconds in adapter governance config
error.IGW-008.suggestion: The external service response contained suspicious content
error.IGW-009.suggestion: Use a more specific action or increase max_response_bytes
error.IGW-010.suggestion: Use rest, graphql, local_script, cli, or mcp
error.CHAT-004.suggestion: Check API key and provider status
error.PCFG-001.suggestion: Use a provider id from GET /api/v1/provider/catalog
error.PCFG-002.suggestion: Use an https:// URL or http://localhost for local providers
error.PCFG-004.suggestion: Provide mode and default_provider with provider_id and api_key
error.EXEC-001.suggestion: Escalate to higher tier or simplify task
error.MOD-001.message: Module tool execution failed in sandbox
error.MOD-002.suggestion: Module attempted connection to a domain not in its allowlist
error.MOD-003.suggestion: Only built-in modules are supported in V1.0
error.MOD-005.suggestion: Retry or increase module_timeout_ms in division config
gui.overlay.heading: Your Office, Your Decisions
gui.overlay.text:
SIDJUA provides you with a fully equipped, secure office building — with security, backup, documentation, and communication infrastructure.

But the company is YOU.

You hire your agents, train them, define workflows, and correct them when things go wrong. You're standing on day one of your new company, in your brand-new office building.

Be aware — some doors are still missing. Some are there, but where are the keys? And some elevator shafts are open but empty. Please tell us what's not working or missing so we can implement it. (Enhancements or design changes may come with additional costs.)

Now get to work!

gui.settings.help.getting_started_body:
SIDJUA automatically connects when running locally — no configuration needed. If you see 'Disconnected', try these steps:

1. Check that the SIDJUA container is running:
   docker ps | grep sidjua

2. Retrieve your API key:
   docker exec sidjua-test cat /app/.system/api-key

3. Paste the key into the API Key field and click Save.

The API key was generated during first startup and is stored securely inside the container.
